name: Drone Waypoint Tracking Analysis
description: An autonomous systems engineer must evaluate the trajectory tracking performance of a quadcopter in CoppeliaSim. Using the standard Quadcopter model, command it through a sequence of at least 5 distinct 3D waypoints by manipulating its target dummy. Log the continuous trajectory and export performance data to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/flight_log.csv (including time_s, waypoint_id, target_x, target_y, target_z, drone_x, drone_y, drone_z, and error_distance_m) and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/flight_metrics.json (including total_waypoints_reached, total_flight_time_s, max_tracking_error_m, mean_tracking_error_m, and path_efficiency). The simulation must be running to capture dynamic flight behavior.
